title: Top Offers
subtitle: Selected ski and summer vacation packages at a special price. Availability is limited—and the best dates go first.
empty: There are currently no active offers.
footer: Offers are valid for the periods listed · To make a reservation, go to the “Book” section

ski-family.title: Family Ski Vacation
ski-family.description: Give your children a memory they’ll cherish for a lifetime. An entire villa just for your family, just minutes from the slopes—and in the evening, a cozy fire and a warm dinner await you at home.
includes: Rent the entire villa for an overnight stay (up to 6 people)
Free parking right outside the door

pay-9-stay-10.title: Pay for 9, stay for 10 nights
pay-9-stay-10.description: Summer in the mountains is something special—cool mornings, long days spent in nature, and evenings on the porch with a barbecue. Stay with us a little longer and treat yourself to a free night’s stay.
includes: The 10th night is completely free (with 9 paid nights)
Entire villa: 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, kitchen, and living room
A veranda with a barbecue and a wood-burning fireplace
